command:
cd "C:\Users\Maruf\Downloads\sadewa"; python -c "
import logging
logging.getLogger('androguard').setLevel(logging.CRITICAL)
logging.getLogger().setLevel(logging.CRITICAL)
from androguard.core.dex import DEX

for fn in ['classes.dex','classes2.dex','classes3.dex']:
    path = r'C:\Users\Maruf\Downloads\sadewa\\' + fn
    with open(path,'rb') as f:
        dvm = DEX(f.read())
    for cls in dvm.get_classes():
        cname = cls.get_name()
        if 'DetailAbsenActivity' in cname and 'get_riwayat' in cname:
            for method in cls.get_methods():
                mname = method.get_name()
                code = method.get_code()
                if not code: continue
                bc = code.get_bc()
                for inst in bc.get_instructions():
                    out = str(inst.get_output())
                    if any(kw in out.lower() for kw in ['foto','face','image','avatar','load','glide','picasso','bitmap']):
                        print(cname + '.' + mname + ': ' + inst.get_name() + ' ' + out)
" 2>$null | Out-String
